load-xml-from-memory-stream.title: Load XML from MemoryStream and Create PDF
load-xml-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates loading XML content from a memory stream using BindXml and saving it as a PDF with default settings.

xml-to-pdf-with-xslt.title: Convert XML to PDF Using Custom XSLT
xml-to-pdf-with-xslt.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with a custom XSLT stylesheet and converting it to a PDF document using Aspose.PDF.

validate-xml-xsd-pdf.title: Validate XML against XSD before PDF Generation
validate-xml-xsd-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to validate an XML file against an XSD schema using .NET and then convert the XML to PDF with Aspose.Pdf only if validation succeeds.

set-pdf-page-size-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Size from XML
set-pdf-page-size-from-xml.description: Creates a PDF document and sets its page size based on width and height values read from an XML file.

set-page-orientation-from-xml.title: Set Page Orientation from XML Attribute
set-page-orientation-from-xml.description: Creates a PDF and sets the page orientation to landscape or portrait based on an XML attribute value.

set-custom-page-margins.title: Set Custom Page Margins from XML
set-custom-page-margins.description: Creates a PDF, reads margin definitions from an XML string and applies them to the specified page ranges.

add-page-numbers-xslt.title: Add Automatic Page Numbers Using XSLT and Pagination Artifacts
add-page-numbers-xslt.description: Demonstrates how to add automatic page numbers to a PDF by converting it to XML, injecting pagination artifacts via XSLT, and binding the modified XML back to a PDF.

xml-to-pdf-table.title: Create PDF Table from XML Data
xml-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates loading tabular data from an XML string into a DataTable and inserting it as a table in a PDF document.

custom-font-xml-elements.title: Apply Custom Font to Specific XML Elements during PDF Generation
custom-font-xml-elements.description: Demonstrates loading XML into a PDF, adding a custom font, and applying it to selected XML-derived text (e.g., the title).

embed-custom-ttf-font-xml.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font into PDF from XML
embed-custom-ttf-font-xml.description: Demonstrates loading XML into a PDF, adding text with a custom TrueType font, and embedding the font into the resulting PDF.

apply-custom-color-scheme.title: Apply Custom Color Scheme to PDF via XML and XSL
apply-custom-color-scheme.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with an XSL stylesheet that defines custom colors and converting it to a PDF document.

set-page-background-color.title: Set Page Background Color from XML Color String
set-page-background-color.description: Demonstrates how to parse an XML color string and apply it as the background color of PDF pages using Aspose.PDF.

add-header-footer-xml.title: Add Header and Footer to PDF Using XML Templates
add-header-footer-xml.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, parse an XML template, and apply header and footer content to each page.

add-background-images-from-xml.title: Add Background Images to PDF Pages from XML
add-background-images-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read an XML file that maps page numbers to image files and apply those images as background artifacts on the corresponding PDF pages.

insert-dynamic-headers.title: Insert Dynamic Headers per Page Using XML Data
insert-dynamic-headers.description: Demonstrates how to bind XML data and use the BeforePageGenerate event to add a different header to each PDF page.

insert-footnotes-from-xml.title: Insert Footnotes from XML into PDF Pages
insert-footnotes-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read footnote definitions from an XML string and insert them as footnote elements on a PDF page using Aspose.PDF.

conditional-page-breaks.title: Insert Conditional Page Breaks Based on XML Content Length
conditional-page-breaks.description: Demonstrates how to add a new PDF page when the length of XML content exceeds a defined threshold.

create-hierarchical-outline.title: Create Hierarchical PDF Outline from XML Structure
create-hierarchical-outline.description: Demonstrates how to parse an XML document and generate a nested PDF outline (bookmarks) that mirrors the XML element hierarchy.

create-pdf-outline-from-xml.title: Create PDF Outline from XML Section Titles
create-pdf-outline-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF and add custom outline entries based on section titles extracted from an XML file.

apply-page-transition-xml.title: Apply Page Transition Effects to PDF Generated from XML
apply-page-transition-xml.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF from an XML source, adding a fade transition to each page, and saving the result.

set-page-duration-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Transition Duration from XML
set-page-duration-from-xml.description: Creates a sample PDF, reads page display durations from an XML file, sets each page's Duration property, and saves the updated PDF.

xml-to-pdf-fullscreen.title: Generate PDF from XML with Full‑Screen Viewer Mode
xml-to-pdf-fullscreen.description: Creates a PDF from an XML file and sets the document to open in full‑screen mode.

set-pdf-permissions-xml.title: Set Custom PDF Permissions for XML-derived PDF
set-pdf-permissions-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF and applying custom permissions to restrict printing and copying.

compress-pdf-streams-xml.title: Compress PDF Streams after XML to PDF Conversion
compress-pdf-streams-xml.description: Demonstrates converting XML to PDF and then compressing PDF object streams to reduce file size.

embed-base64-images-xml.title: Embed Base64 Images from XML into PDF
embed-base64-images-xml.description: Loads an XML file containing Base64‑encoded images, decodes them, and embeds the images into a newly created PDF document.

render-html-cdata-to-pdf.title: Render HTML CDATA Fragments from XML into PDF
render-html-cdata-to-pdf.description: Extracts HTML fragments stored inside CDATA sections of an XML file and converts each fragment to PDF pages, merging them into a single PDF document.

create-barcode-from-xml.title: Create Barcode Field from XML in PDF
create-barcode-from-xml.description: Loads an XML file into a PDF document and adds a Code128 barcode field on the first page.

embed-video-annotation.title: Embed Video as Rich Media Annotation from XML
embed-video-annotation.description: Demonstrates reading video file references from an XML file and embedding them as RichMedia annotations in a PDF document.

embed-3d-model-annotation.title: Embed 3D Model as Interactive PDF Annotation
embed-3d-model-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to read 3D model file paths from an XML file and embed each model as an interactive 3D annotation in a PDF.

populate-pdf-form-from-xml.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML for Multiple Records
populate-pdf-form-from-xml.description: Loads a PDF form template and fills its fields with values from each record in an XML file, creating a separate PDF for each record.

extract-text-from-xml-pdf.title: Extract Plain Text from PDF Generated from XML
extract-text-from-xml-pdf.description: Creates a PDF from an XML file, then extracts plain text using TextAbsorber for indexing purposes.

export-pdf-pages-to-png.title: Export PDF Pages Created from XML to Separate PNG Images
export-pdf-pages-to-png.description: Creates a PDF from XML, loads it, and saves each page as an individual PNG image file.

convert-pdf-to-png.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution PNG Images
convert-pdf-to-png.description: Demonstrates how to render each page of a PDF document to a high‑resolution PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.title: Batch Convert XML Files to PDF
batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.description: Converts every XML file in a specified folder to an individual PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

repeat-table-header-rows.title: Repeat Table Header Rows on Each PDF Page
repeat-table-header-rows.description: Demonstrates how to set a table's RepeatingRowsCount so that header rows are automatically repeated on each page when the table spans multiple pages.

extract-pdf-xml.title: Extract PDF to XML Representation
extract-pdf-xml.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, then extract its XML representation using Aspose.Pdf.

xml-to-html-preview.title: Convert XML to PDF and then to HTML for Web Preview
xml-to-html-preview.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF document and saving it as HTML using Aspose.Pdf.

xml-to-pdf-logging.title: Convert XML Files to PDF with Logging and Error Handling
xml-to-pdf-logging.description: Loads up to four XML files, converts each to PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and logs each step and any errors to the console.

xml-to-pdf-graceful-error-handling.title: Convert XML to PDF with Graceful Error Handling
xml-to-pdf-graceful-error-handling.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF using XmlLoadOptions with a warning handler to capture parsing errors and display user‑friendly messages.

thread-safe-pdf-generation.title: Thread‑Safe PDF Generation from Multiple XML Files
thread-safe-pdf-generation.description: Demonstrates generating PDFs from XML files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf while ensuring each thread uses its own Document instance.

batch-xml-to-pdf-profiling.title: Batch XML to PDF Conversion with Performance Profiling
batch-xml-to-pdf-profiling.description: Converts all XML files in the current folder to PDF while measuring the time taken for each conversion to identify performance bottlenecks.

retry-pdf-generation.title: Retry PDF Generation on Transient I/O Errors
retry-pdf-generation.description: Demonstrates how to retry PDF creation when a transient I/O error occurs using Aspose.Pdf.

xml-to-pdf-using-config.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSLT Path from Configuration
xml-to-pdf-using-config.description: Demonstrates reading an XSLT file path from a JSON configuration file and using Aspose.Pdf to convert an XML document to PDF.

xml-to-pdf-xslfo.title: Convert XML to PDF using XSL‑FO Template
xml-to-pdf-xslfo.description: Demonstrates how to apply an XSL‑FO template to an XML file and generate a PDF with precise layout using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-conditional-page-margins.title: Apply Conditional Page Margins Using XML Definitions
apply-conditional-page-margins.description: Demonstrates how to read margin settings from an XML document and apply different margins to odd and even pages of a PDF using Aspose.PDF.
